notes: Eval 3 (moc-add-project) passes 100% in both configurations — Claude handles structured MOC tasks well without the skill. This eval is non-discriminating.
The skill's primary value shows in evals 1 and 2: presenting organization options (PARA/MOC/flat+tags/Johnny Decimal) and recommending obsidian move commands over shell mv.
With-skill runs use ~20% more tokens but achieve 100% pass rate across all evals vs 88% without.
Without-skill runs failed on: (1) not presenting org system alternatives, (2) missing attachments directory, (3) using mv instead of obsidian move.
